yEckbZ dks 62-500 fd-eh- rd izfrcaf/kr fd;k x;k gSA yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@780@lhvks@14&15@thlh@xka/kh/kke ¼dkaMyk½&eqanzk iksVZ lsD'ku&chvksVh] fVIi.kh fVIi.kh fVIi.kh fVIi.kh % ewy vf/klwpuk dk-vk- 50¼v½ rkjh[k 06 tuojh] 2015 }kjk Hkkjr ds jkti= esa izdkf'kr dh xbZ FkhA -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th January, 2016 S.O. 263(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 50 (E), dated 06.01.2015, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely: (i) Point 1 after Table 1 & 2 shall stand revised as under:— The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plazas for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s) (chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable km 44.500 (design chainage) (existing chainage km 46.500) (near Mokha village in Kutch district) 62.500* (excluding length of Anjar Bypass) *Length of road as per actual construction at site is 62.670 km however the tollable length is restricted to 62.500 km as per Schedule R. [F. No. NHAI/13013/780/CO/14-15/GC/ Gandhidham (Kandla –Mundra Port Section–BOT] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide S.O. 50(E) dated 06th January.2015. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
